description: End-to-End Validation Tests - Create comprehensive TDD tests that validate the complete pipeline flow including happy path (valid input through to output), error scenarios (invalid file extensions, missing fields, unexpected buckets), retry behavior verification, and input validation rejection. Also add Python unit tests for the Lambda handler.
steps: Create a new test file src/CdkBase.Tests/EndToEndValidationTest.cs with end-to-end validation tests that verify the full pipeline flow through the synthesized CloudFormation template

Add tests verifying the happy path: S3 upload -> EventBridge -> Step Functions -> WriteInitialMetadata -> ValidateInput (passes for .mp3/.wav/.ogg/.txt) -> ProcessAudio (Lambda) -> SynthesizeSpeech (Polly) -> UpdateStatusCompleted -> PublishSuccessNotification. Verify correct state wiring, DynamoDB metadata updates at each stage, and SNS notification at the end.

Add tests verifying error scenarios: invalid file extension triggers ValidationFailed -> UpdateStatusFailed -> PublishFailureNotification path; verify error info is captured in DynamoDB update expression; verify failure notification contains error details

Add tests verifying retry behavior: confirm WriteInitialMetadata, ProcessAudio, SynthesizeSpeech, and UpdateStatusCompleted all have retry configurations with correct parameters (IntervalSeconds, MaxAttempts, BackoffRate)
Add tests verifying the ProcessAudio Lambda has specific error catches (Lambda.ServiceException, Lambda.SdkClientException) in addition to States.ALL catch

Add tests verifying the Lambda function configuration: 30-second timeout, 512MB memory, Python 3.12 runtime, X-Ray tracing active, correct environment variables (TABLE_NAME, INPUT_BUCKET_NAME, OUTPUT_BUCKET_NAME) all reference correct resources
Add tests verifying output bucket receives write permissions from Lambda (GrantWrite), input bucket grants read to Lambda (GrantRead), and DynamoDB grants read/write to Lambda (GrantReadWriteData)
Add tests verifying CloudWatch alarms are wired to SNS failed topic (alarm actions reference the failed topic)

Create Python unit tests at src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/test_index.py that test the Lambda handler: valid input processing, input validation (missing fields, unsupported extension, wrong bucket), file size limit check, and structured logging output

Ensure all new tests pass by running 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal' and 'python -m pytest src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/test_index.py' (or python -m unittest)
acceptance_criteria: All new end-to-end validation tests pass in src/CdkBase.Tests/EndToEndValidationTest.cs
Python Lambda unit tests pass in src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio/test_index.py
Tests cover: happy path flow, error path flow, retry configuration, input validation, Lambda permissions, CloudWatch alarm wiring
Running 'dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal' shows all tests passing (existing 73 + new tests)
Running 'npx cdk synth' still succeeds without errors
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
cd src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio && python -m pytest test_index.py -v || python -m unittest test_index -v
findings: All 56 C# end-to-end validation tests pass. All 19 Python Lambda unit tests pass. Running all 129 dotnet tests simultaneously can cause JSII runtime communication errors (pre-existing resource exhaustion issue), but tests pass reliably when run by class filter (--filter). CDK synth succeeds. Python tests require PYENV_VERSION=3.12.13 to use the correct python version. pytest and boto3 were installed for the 3.12 environment.
